scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key components correctly: ContainerPath, LocalPath, PathProtocol, ensure_contents signature and semantics, absolute-path requirement, bool return value. Extra detail (unlink, rmdir, is_file, is_dir, parent) is plausible for a pathlib-like interface and not contradicted by the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the response adds plausible pathlib methods not listed in gold standard but consistent with 'pathlib-like interface' description; the keyword-only `*` in ensure_contents is a minor presentation difference (gold standard shows positional-capable params), but not a fabricated API
